site_purpose: Showcase our menu and accept online reservations

home.headline: Authentic Wood-Fired Pizza Since 1987
home.subheadline: Family recipes, locally sourced ingredients, unforgettable taste.

about.headline: Our Story
about.body: Joe's Pizzeria has been a neighborhood staple for over 35 years. Founded by Giuseppe Rossi, we've been serving handcrafted, wood-fired pizzas using recipes passed down through three generations.

notes: We use OpenTable for reservations. Hours: Tue-Sun 11am-10pm.
